mapper.insert: insert into employee(name, sn, phone, email, department_id, position) values(#{name}, #{sn}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{departmentId}, #{position})
mapper.update: update employee set name = #{name}, sn = #{sn}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position = #{position} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select e.id, e.name, e.sn, e.phone, e.email, e.department_id as departmentId, d.name as departmentName, e.position from employee e left join department d on e.department_id = d.id

select e.id, e.name, e.sn, e.phone, e.email, e.department_id as departmentId, d.name as departmentName, e.position from employee e left join department d on e.department_id = d.id
and e.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and d.name like concat('%', #{departmentName}, '%')
and e.position like concat('%', #{position}, '%')
